meta.title: Move BarChart to ui-graphs package with SCSS modules and bigint support
meta.body_summary: Migrate BarChart components from app/library to ui-graphs with SCSS modules and bigint types, claiming better performance and type safety versus BigNumber.

perf_labels.notes: Copilot package migration with narrative bigint perf claim; zero formal reviews, single 'Stale' comment, closed after ~3.8h without merge.

change_scale_vs_repository.interpretation: At 815 changed lines across 22 files, this is a medium-sized refactor by absolute volume. As a package-migration performance PR it was closed without merge—no review engagement and marked stale rather than merged.

review_details.concern_detail: No formal review or CHANGES_REQUESTED feedback in the dataset. The only PR comment is maintainer rossbulat labeling the PR 'Stale', indicating lack of active progress or maintainer interest.
review_details.performance_claim: Replace BigNumber with bigint for better performance and type safety; migrate BarChart to ui-graphs with SCSS modules.
review_details.rejection_signals: Closed as stale with no substantive review discussion on performance or correctness.

capability_boundary.boundary_notes: Frontend package refactor spanning multiple packages; without maintainer engagement or benchmarks, Agent PRs in this workflow can be closed as stale even when linked to an issue.

detection_detail.code_reading: No evidence of code-reading review in dataset; review was requested but no formal review text recorded.

maintainer_practices.reproducibility_notes: No benchmark, profiling, or before/after metrics for bigint or bundle impact; only narrative claims in PR body.
maintainer_practices.regression_detail: PR closed without merge after being marked stale; no fix-in-PR cycle occurred.

core_change_summary.description: Move BarChart components from packages/app to packages/ui-graphs, convert styled-components Wrappers to SCSS modules, replace BigNumber with bigint, and remove legacy app/library BarChart files.
core_change_summary.secondary_note: Changes also touch global-bus network config files; migration removes duplicate legacy BarChart code under packages/app.
change_trajectory: Initial plan commit for linked issue.
Create BarChart in ui-graphs with SCSS modules.
Complete migration and remove legacy app/library components.
Merge main; no review feedback before stale close.

review_signals.summary: Single-word comment 'Stale' indicating the PR is outdated or inactive.

collaboration_trajectory: Copilot opened PR linked to issue; review requested and copilot_work_started/finished events recorded.
No formal review text captured in dataset.
Maintainer commented 'Stale' and PR closed within ~3.8 hours of creation.
